name: North: Almond Pistachio Saffron Curry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Shelled, unsalted raw pistachio nuts
2 tablespoons Butter or mild vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak saffron in 2 tablespoons hot water.
2. Combine almonds and pistachios in a frying pan; dry-roast over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes until fragrant.
3. Place the mixture in a blender or food processor and reduce to a powder. Set aside.
4. Heat butter in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook until lightly browned.
5. Stir in spices, saffron, cream, salt, and powdered nuts. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
6. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is thick enough to coat the back of a spoon (12 to 15 minutes).
7. Serve the smooth sauce over grilled meat or chicken breasts. One recipe will yield about 1 1/2 pounds of cooked meat. For an exotic twist, simmer meatballs in it for 15 minutes.
8. Makes 2 1/2 cups.
